frontend: App: Remove unused themeName dependency
helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
backend: auth/kubeconfig: Skip empty OIDC CA cert instead of failing
backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
frontend: SimpleTable: Fix stale defaultRowsPerPage after settings change
frontend: useKubeObjectList: Fix state overwrite during render

frontend: ScaleButton: Memoize replica count computation

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include `Fixes #NN`, `closes #NN`, or similar auto-close keywords in commit messages.
Approval style is warm and brief: `🎉 thanks!` is the standard merge acknowledgment from maintainers.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs; its presence does NOT indicate human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need — pure stylistic refactors without justification are not accepted.
Frontend (TypeScript/React): fix `exhaustive-deps` lint violations rather than suppressing with `eslint-disable`; Material-UI v5 patterns used.
Backend (Go): use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first, risk-averse style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
k8s-ci-robot posts automated IssueComments on every PR — these are bot comments and do not count as human review activity.
